chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Appl. No. S- 281 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 09.03.2026 For orders on office objections For hearing of main case Mr. Aijaz Ali Rajar, Advocate along with applicant Ms. Sana Memon APG The applicant is charged with Section 420 & 406 PPC. Section 420 PPC is a bailable offence. It is yet to be determined whether the alleged transaction which gives rise to this case falls within the definition of criminal breach of trust. Accordingly the interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicant is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
